vi-VN.Select one target in the 'Apply to' sect: Chọn một mục tiêu trong phần 'Apply to'.
vi-VN.Set the base color of the cell when it c: Đặt màu cơ bản của ô khi ô có dữ liệu. Tùy chọn này có thể bị ghi đè bởi advanced color rules.
vi-VN.Set the culture code in the format langu: Đặt mã văn hóa theo định dạng languageCode-countryCode.
vi-VN.Set the number formatting for what conce: Đặt định dạng số liên quan đến dấu phân cách hàng nghìn và dấu phân cách thập phân.
vi-VN.Set the static color of the cell for tod: Đặt màu tĩnh của ô cho Today. Tùy chọn này ghi đè advanced color rules.
vi-VN.Set the static color of the cell for wee: Đặt màu tĩnh của ô cho các ngày cuối tuần. Tùy chọn này ghi đè advanced color rules.
vi-VN.Set the static color of the cell when it: Đặt màu tĩnh của ô khi không có dữ liệu. Tùy chọn này có thể bị ghi đè bởi data color và advanced color rules.
vi-VN.Sets the initial period displayed by the: Thiết lập giai đoạn ban đầu được hiển thị bởi calendar. Khi bật, giai đoạn ban đầu bao gồm ngày hiện tại. invertAxis.description: Invert the axes of the chart. It's limited to: Hours by Day/Month/Quarter, and Months By Quarter.
invertAxis.descriptionKey: Invert the axes of the chart. It's limited to: Hours by Day/Month/Quarter, and Months By Quarter.

leapRule.description: An additional week must be appended to week calendars (364-day long) to catch up for leap years and missing days. Choose how to calculate it.
leapRule.descriptionKey: An additional week must be appended to week calendars (364-day long) to catch up for leap years and missing days. Choose how to calculate it.

leapAppend.description: Choose the month where to append the extra week.
leapAppend.descriptionKey: Choose the month where to append the extra week.

leapYears.description: Choose when to append the extra week.
leapYears.descriptionKey: Choose when to append the extra week.

leapStart.description: Choose the year from which start counting.
leapStart.descriptionKey: Choose the year from which start counting.

monthEndDay.description: If you set a number longer than the month size, days from the next one will be included to fit in. If you leave blank, the last day of the month as defined by the Gregorian calendar is used.
monthEndDay.descriptionKey: If you set a number longer than the month size, days from the next one will be included to fit in. If you leave blank, the last day of the month as defined by the Gregorian calendar is used.

yearEndWeekday.description: How to choose the last weekday of the year? E.g.: If your week starts on Sunday, then the last weekday is Saturday. With 'Last of the year' the fiscal year ends on the last Saturday of the last month. Otherwise, the fiscal year ends on the Saturday closest to the last day of the last month - it could be on the next year.
yearEndWeekday.descriptionKey: How to choose the last weekday of the year? E.g.: If your week starts on Sunday, then the last weekday is Saturday. With 'Last of the year' the fiscal year ends on the last Saturday of the last month. Otherwise, the fiscal year ends on the Saturday closest to the last day of the last month - it could be on the next year.

weekStart.description: Choose the first weekday of each week. For fiscal and weekly calendars (4-4-5, 4-5-4, 5-4-4) this option doesn't impact only the layout of the calender, but also define the first day of each month.
weekStart.descriptionKey: Choose the first weekday of each week. For fiscal and weekly calendars (4-4-5, 4-5-4, 5-4-4) this option doesn't impact only the layout of the calender, but also define the first day of each month.

completeYears.description: Make the calendar displaying complete years also if the data interval starts/ends from/to different dates.
completeYears.descriptionKey: Make the calendar displaying complete years also if the data interval starts/ends from/to different dates.

defaultToday.description: Sets the initial period displayed by the calendar. When this is on, the initial period includes the current date. When this is off, the initial period is the last selected one. NOTE: This option works only if the calendar interval includes the current date.
defaultToday.descriptionKey: Sets the initial period displayed by the calendar. When this is on, the initial period includes the current date. When this is off, the initial period is the last selected one. NOTE: This option works only if the calendar interval includes the current date.

filterToday.description: Applies a filter with the current date when the visual is loaded for the first time. When this is off, the filter is the last selected one or none if nothing has been selected before. NOTE: This option works only if the calendar interval includes the current date.
filterToday.descriptionKey: Applies a filter with the current date when the visual is loaded for the first time. When this is off, the filter is the last selected one or none if nothing has been selected before. NOTE: This option works only if the calendar interval includes the current date.

timezone.description: Choose the time zone to be used for the calendar. Leave (Auto) to use the system time zone. This setting is mainly used to determine the user's current date when displaying by Power BI automation, such as report subscriptions. Note that the offset displayed in the list does not take Daylight Saving Time (DST) into account.
timezone.descriptionKey: Choose the time zone to be used for the calendar. Leave (Auto) to use the system time zone. This setting is mainly used to determine the user's current date when displaying by Power BI automation, such as report subscriptions. Note that the offset displayed in the list does not take Daylight Saving Time (DST) into account.

granularity.description: Define what entities are considered as cell.
granularity.descriptionKey: Define what entities are considered as cell.

allGranularities.description: Allow users to see all granularities. Disable it to choose which granularities to exclude.
allGranularities.descriptionKey: Allow users to see all granularities. Disable it to choose which granularities to exclude.

blankFill.description: Set the static color of the cell when it contains no data. This option can be overridden by data color and advanced color rules.
blankFill.descriptionKey: Set the static color of the cell when it contains no data. This option can be overridden by data color and advanced color rules.

fill.description: Set the base color of the cell when it contains data. This option can be overridden by advanced color rules.
fill.descriptionKey: Set the base color of the cell when it contains data. This option can be overridden by advanced color rules.

weekendFill.description: Set the static color of the cell for weekend days. This option overrides advanced color rules.
weekendFill.descriptionKey: Set the static color of the cell for weekend days. This option overrides advanced color rules.

showToday.description: Display today cell in a different color as defined below. This option overrides advanced color rules.
showToday.descriptionKey: Display today cell in a different color as defined below. This option overrides advanced color rules.

todayFill.description: Set the static color of the cell for today. This option overrides the advanced color rules.
todayFill.descriptionKey: Set the static color of the cell for today. This option overrides the advanced color rules.

extendTodayFill.description: Extend the Today color option to any granularity, e.g. the month, the quarter, the current year.
extendTodayFill.descriptionKey: Extend the Today color option to any granularity, e.g. the month, the quarter, the current year.

join.description: When the same event spans across different adjacent days, it is displayed as a single one. It applies only to column events when event's start/end time is not defined.
join.descriptionKey: When the same event spans across different adjacent days, it is displayed as a single one. It applies only to column events when event's start/end time is not defined.

defaultFill.description: When a column is connected to the Event Color field well, this option sets the default color for Events without an assigned color.
defaultFill.descriptionKey: When a column is connected to the Event Color field well, this option sets the default color for Events without an assigned color.

aggregate.description: When turned on, it assigns a single color to every event. When turned off, it gives the possibility to assign different colors to different events, according to the source event field.
aggregate.descriptionKey: When turned on, it assigns a single color to every event. When turned off, it gives the possibility to assign different colors to different events, according to the source event field.
